name: ExtensionEvidenceReport_RelatesTo
title: R5: Relationships to other compositions/documents (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `EvidenceReport.relatesTo` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`EvidenceReport.relatesTo` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `EvidenceReport.relatesTo` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `EvidenceReport.relatesTo` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `EvidenceReport` is not mapped.
Element `EvidenceReport.relatesTo` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:

A document is a version specific composition.

element.short: R5: replaces | amends | appends | transforms | replacedWith | amendedWith | appendedWith | transformedWith (new)
element.comment:
Element `EvidenceReport.relatesTo.code` is part of an existing definition because parent element `EvidenceReport.relatesTo` requires a cross-version extension.
Element `EvidenceReport.relatesTo.code` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `EvidenceReport` is not mapped.
Element `EvidenceReport.relatesTo.code` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
If this document appends another document, then the document cannot be fully understood without also accessing the referenced document.
